code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1★ (Very Negative):
    - Complete failure to perform core function despite proper usage
    - Multiple defects across purchases or dangerous malfunctions
    - Negative updates erasing previous positive experiences
    - Explicit "avoid purchase" warnings with defect evidence

    2★ (Negative):
    - Partial functionality requiring constant adjustments/workarounds
    - Persistent frustration despite occasional success
    - Clearly inferior to alternatives in critical aspects
    - Regret expressed through cost/value complaints

    3★ (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with contextual limitations ("good for...")
    - Adequate performance with notable quality compromises
    - Conditional recommendations without full endorsement

    4★ (Positive):
    - Single functional flaw impacting core utility (e.g. sizing)
    - Brief factual positivity without enthusiasm ("works fine")
    - Assembly difficulties resolved with final satisfaction
    - Star deduction phrases ("only 4 because...")

    5★ (Very Positive):
    - Concise praise without criticism →5 even if brief ("Fits perfectly")
    - 3+ praised aspects (function/design/durability) with satisfaction
    - Solves persistent problems better than previous solutions
    - Non-functional criticism WITH enthusiastic core functionality praise
    - Close comparisons to top brands with satisfied daily use
    - Long-term validation (>6mo) overcoming initial skepticism

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Works as intended" + no flaws →5 regardless of brevity
    - Functional praise + non-functional criticism →5 (e.g. color/style)
    - Favorable brand comparisons →5 if recommending despite minor differences
    - Multi-purchase failures →1 even if first unit worked
    - Brief effectiveness statements →4 unless explicit satisfaction markers
    - Core functionality excellence post-setup →5 ("worth the effort")
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Does exactly what needed - deep pockets fit any mattress"
<Reasoning>Concise functional praise without negatives →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Works as described. No issues."
<Reasoning>Factual description lacks enthusiasm markers →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Second unit failed faster. Dangerous defects!"
<Reasoning>Multi-purchase safety failures override positives →1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Nearly matches Lodge! Daily driver despite minor differences"
<Reasoning>Favorable brand comparison with satisfaction →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Vibrant colors need ironing but last for years"
<Reasoning>Non-functional tradeoff with core durability praise →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. Initial satisfaction gone"
<Reasoning>Negative update overriding previous experience →1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Constant adjustments needed for basic function"
<Reasoning>Excessive workarounds →2</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Good for guest room use but too thin for daily"
<Reasoning>Contextual limitation with compromise →3</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Rollers handle bumps perfectly! Tough installation"
<Reasoning>Core excellence outweighs setup effort →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Works well after washing but edges stay stiff"
<Reasoning>Lingering functional drawback →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (31 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 14
  gold 4 -> 3: 5
  gold 5 -> 4: 5
  gold 5 -> 3: 2
  gold 2 -> 1: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "This is a good, though not extra ordinary storage bin. It lacks exceptional build quality, exceptional attention to detail, or anything that's all that remarkable. It looks good, and the pattern is timeless, plus it keeps stuff together. You could do..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "This mattress get 4 stars for comfort, but there's so many other nice features about it that it gets 5 starts for everything else. To begin with, I wouldn't suggest using this as a long term every day bed for someone. The shallow design and budget pr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  3. Review: "It's a very solid bed that feels like it's going to hold up to just about anything. Assembly wasn't too difficult, though there were a couple of parts that had to be under some pressure to get the screw holes to line up just right. Also, when we firs..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  4. Review: "This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), a..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.33
  5. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This looks like a great idea and easy to use, but actually it's very awkward. The idea is to hang your jewelry in the closet. But the hanger part doesn't swivel, so if you want to select an item, you have to remove it from the closet and lay it on th..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 31 errors, 19 borderline out of 80 examples."}
